productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kaiser Red Blue Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: shirt with red gingham checks made of 100% cotton with two patch pockets on the chest, embroidery near the right hem and appliques on the right back and left sleeveshorts: denim shorts made of stretchable cotton with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery detailingFittingTop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge the little sailor spirit of your little boy in this red checked shirt and denim shorts combo from gini and jony. The sailor inspired lettering on the front of the shirt, seal patches on the back and sleeve - all add to the adventurous energy of this shirt. Team this with the super comfy denim shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
